listitem.para: Explain the extensive name format for Brazilians? How would you address a woman and a man?
What are some common health conditions of Brazilians in the United States?
Under what conditions can Brazilians with AIDS come to the United States?
Identify at least three barriers to health care for Brazilians in the United States.
Identify at least three high-risk health behaviors common among Brazilians. What might you do to help decrease these barriers?
Identify three Brazilian fold practitioners. What are the tenets of each?
Identify taboo practices for pregnant Brazilian women.
Describe communication practices of Brazilians with intimates. With non-intimates.
What are comadres and what are their roles?
What is the greatest source of strength among Brazilians?
